raw_consumer_statement: I contacted Citibank after my family 's cards ( XXXX XXXX & XXXX XXXX ) were lost during our vacation. Upon checking my account, I discovered that my sons card had been stolen and used. I promptly notified Citibank about the fraudulent charges. They apologized for the inconvenience and assured me that cardholders have XXXX liability for fraud, and a temporary credit would be issued while the claim is processed. However, no action has been taken since the claim was filed. Despite being a loyal customer and continuing to pay my bill, this situation has created a hardship and is negatively impacting my credit and credit line. This issue needs to be resolved and updated immediately.
